notes.en: Images and controls expose text alternatives; decorative canvas content is outside the interaction tree.
notes.vi: Hinh anh va dieu khien co ten thay the; canvas trang tri khong nam trong cay tuong tac.

notes.en: The public site does not ship prerecorded audio-only or video-only media.
notes.vi: Trang cong khai khong phat hanh audio-only hoac video-only da ghi san.

notes.en: No prerecorded synchronized media is currently published.
notes.vi: Hien khong co media dong bo da ghi san.

notes.en: No prerecorded video requiring audio description is currently published.
notes.vi: Hien khong co video da ghi san can audio description.

notes.en: The public site does not provide live synchronized media.
notes.vi: Trang cong khai khong cung cap media truc tiep dong bo.

notes.en: No prerecorded video is currently published; static storyboard text carries the same core information.
notes.vi: Hien khong co video da ghi san; storyboard tinh mang cung thong tin cot loi.

notes.en: Pages use semantic headings, landmarks, forms, fieldsets, labels, and tables.
notes.vi: Trang dung heading, landmark, form, fieldset, label, va bang co ngu nghia.

notes.en: DOM reading order matches the visible story, CTA flow, and lite storyboard order.
notes.vi: Thu tu doc DOM khop voi cau chuyen, luong CTA, va storyboard tinh.

notes.en: Instructions do not rely only on color, shape, position, or motion.
notes.vi: Huong dan khong chi dua vao mau sac, hinh dang, vi tri, hoac chuyen dong.

notes.en: Responsive layouts work in portrait and landscape without locking orientation.
notes.vi: Layout responsive hoat dong o doc va ngang, khong khoa huong man hinh.

notes.en: CTA fields use autocomplete tokens for name, email, organization, country, and URL fields.
notes.vi: Truong CTA dung autocomplete cho ten, email, to chuc, quoc gia, va URL.

notes.en: States include text, borders, icons, and ARIA state, not color alone.
notes.vi: Trang thai co chu, vien, icon, va ARIA; khong chi dung mau.

notes.en: Audio starts muted and has a persistent accessible mute toggle.
notes.vi: Am thanh mac dinh tat va co nut bat/tat co the truy cap.

notes.en: Token and route checks maintain AA text contrast for public content.
notes.vi: Token va kiem tra route giu tuong phan chu dat AA cho noi dung cong khai.

notes.en: Layouts use responsive CSS and avoid fixed text containers that clip at zoom.
notes.vi: Layout dung CSS responsive va tranh khung chu co dinh gay cat khi zoom.

notes.en: Primary copy is HTML text; storyboard images have equivalent adjacent text.
notes.vi: Noi dung chinh la HTML text; anh storyboard co chu tuong duong ben canh.

notes.en: Routes are tested down to 320 px without requiring two-dimensional scrolling.
notes.vi: Cac route duoc kiem tra toi 320 px ma khong can cuon hai chieu.

notes.en: Focus indicators, controls, and form states use visible borders and contrast tokens.
notes.vi: Vong focus, dieu khien, va trang thai form dung vien ro va token tuong phan.

notes.en: Components use flexible line-height and spacing without clipping when spacing changes.
notes.vi: Component dung line-height va spacing linh hoat, khong cat chu khi doi spacing.

notes.en: Hover/focus content is dismissible or non-blocking; core content remains available without hover.
notes.vi: Noi dung hover/focus co the bo qua hoac khong chan; noi dung chinh khong phu thuoc hover.

notes.en: CTA, navigation, lite mode, mute, and skip controls are operable by keyboard.
notes.vi: CTA, dieu huong, lite mode, mute, va skip deu dung duoc bang ban phim.

notes.en: Modal and route focus flows support Escape/cancel exits and predictable tab movement.
notes.vi: Modal va route ho tro Escape/cancel va thu tu Tab du doan duoc.

notes.en: No single-character shortcuts are active on the public site.
notes.vi: Trang cong khai khong kich hoat phim tat mot ky tu.

notes.en: Core interactions have no user-facing time limits; transient announcements are non-blocking.
notes.vi: Tuong tac chinh khong co gioi han thoi gian; thong bao ngan khong chan nguoi dung.

notes.en: Users can switch to `/lite`; reduced-motion disables animation-heavy surfaces.
notes.vi: Nguoi dung co the chuyen sang `/lite`; reduced-motion tat cac be mat nhieu chuyen dong.

notes.en: The experience avoids flashing content and uses subdued cinematic motion.
notes.vi: Trai nghiem tranh noi dung nhap nhay va dung chuyen dong tiet che.

notes.en: Skip-story control is the first focusable element and moves focus to the CTA hub.
notes.vi: Nut skip-story la phan tu focus dau tien va dua focus toi CTA hub.

notes.en: Route metadata defines descriptive titles and canonical URLs.
notes.vi: Metadata route khai bao title mo ta va canonical URL.

notes.en: Keyboard tests verify route focus starts at skip controls and reaches CTA/footer paths.
notes.vi: Kiem tra ban phim xac minh focus bat dau o skip controls va den CTA/footer.

notes.en: Links use descriptive text or accessible names tied to their destination.
notes.vi: Link dung chu mo ta hoac ten truy cap gan voi diem den.

notes.en: Footer, route links, sitemap, and direct URLs provide multiple navigation paths.
notes.vi: Footer, link route, sitemap, va URL truc tiep cung cap nhieu duong dieu huong.

notes.en: Pages and forms use visible labels and descriptive section headings.
notes.vi: Trang va form dung label hien thi va heading section ro rang.

notes.en: Global focus rings use a 2 px visible outline with offset.
notes.vi: Focus ring toan cuc dung outline 2 px co offset.

notes.en: Sticky modal actions and route controls preserve visible focused elements.
notes.vi: Action sticky trong modal va controls route giu phan tu focus hien ro.

notes.en: Interactions use simple taps/clicks and do not require multipoint gestures.
notes.vi: Tuong tac dung cham/click don gian, khong yeu cau cu chi nhieu diem.

notes.en: Buttons and links use standard activation behavior without down-event-only actions.
notes.vi: Button va link dung hanh vi kich hoat chuan, khong chi xu ly down-event.

notes.en: Visible button/link text is included in accessible names.
notes.vi: Chu hien thi cua button/link nam trong ten truy cap.

notes.en: No core action requires device motion; all actions have pointer and keyboard alternatives.
notes.vi: Khong hanh dong chinh nao can chuyen dong thiet bi; deu co pointer va ban phim.

notes.en: No core flow requires dragging; CTA and navigation use click/keyboard controls.
notes.vi: Khong luong chinh nao yeu cau keo tha; CTA va dieu huong dung click/ban phim.

notes.en: Public interactives are tested at 44 x 44 px, exceeding the AA minimum.
notes.vi: Phan tu tuong tac cong khai duoc kiem tra 44 x 44 px, vuot muc AA toi thieu.

notes.en: English and Vietnamese content are routed separately; html lang is being tracked for middleware parity.
notes.vi: Noi dung Anh/Viet duoc route rieng; html lang dang duoc theo doi de dong bo middleware.

notes.en: Vietnamese route copy exists; mixed English brand and technical terms remain intentional and documented.
notes.vi: Route tieng Viet da co copy; thuat ngu brand/ky thuat tieng Anh la co chu dich va duoc ghi nhan.

notes.en: Receiving focus does not unexpectedly change context.
notes.vi: Nhan focus khong doi context bat ngo.

notes.en: Input changes validate or reveal inline feedback without unexpected navigation.
notes.vi: Thay doi input chi validate hoac hien feedback, khong dieu huong bat ngo.

notes.en: Footer and accessibility controls are consistent across public pages.
notes.vi: Footer va accessibility controls nhat quan tren cac trang cong khai.

notes.en: Repeated controls keep consistent labels and roles.
notes.vi: Controls lap lai giu label va role nhat quan.

notes.en: Accessibility contact and footer help paths are consistently available.
notes.vi: Lien he accessibility va duong ho tro footer luon co san.

notes.en: Form errors are identified inline and announced with role=alert/live regions.
notes.vi: Loi form duoc xac dinh inline va thong bao bang role=alert/live regions.

notes.en: All CTA form fields have programmatic labels and visible instructions.
notes.vi: Tat ca truong CTA co label lap trinh duoc va huong dan hien thi.

notes.en: Validation messages explain how to fix invalid values.
notes.vi: Thong bao validation giai thich cach sua gia tri khong hop le.

notes.en: The site does not execute legal, financial, or irreversible user-data transactions.
notes.vi: Trang khong thuc hien giao dich phap ly, tai chinh, hoac du lieu khong the hoan tac.

notes.en: CTA forms can reuse saved contact details for 24 hours with explicit user consent.
notes.vi: CTA forms co the dung lai thong tin lien he trong 24 gio voi dong y ro rang.

notes.en: The public site has no authentication flow or cognitive-function login test.
notes.vi: Trang cong khai khong co dang nhap hoac bai test nhan thuc.

notes.en: Interactive components expose accessible names, roles, values, and states.
notes.vi: Component tuong tac co ten, role, gia tri, va trang thai truy cap duoc.

notes.en: Narration, skip controls, form errors, and save/clear actions use live status regions.
notes.vi: Narration, skip controls, loi form, va hanh dong luu/xoa dung live status regions.

notes.en: Adopted above AA: reduced-motion users can use the static lite route.
notes.vi: Ap dung tren AA: nguoi dung reduced-motion co route lite tinh.

notes.en: Adopted above AA: visible controls target 44 x 44 px across covered breakpoints.
notes.vi: Ap dung tren AA: controls hien thi dat 44 x 44 px tren breakpoint duoc kiem tra.
